d: Utility token issued via an open-source phased IDO Hook on Xahau Network. Features time-decaying multipliers, soft-cap protection, automatic unwind/refund, and on-chain transparency for fair fundraising.

platform.programmability: Account-attached Hooks (WebAssembly) for on-ledger automation and transaction logic
platform.token_type: Issued IOU (fungible token created via payments/Remits after TrustSet)
key_features: Soft cap threshold with automatic post-window refund/unwind if unmet
On-chain global counters: executions, total raised, total issued, per-phase stats
Per-user participation tracking via hierarchical state namespaces
WP_LNK parameter during install → used as access token to imply acknowledgment of disclosures

ido_mechanics.unwind_mechanism: If soft cap unmet after window: participants return exact IOU balance → Hook emits proportional XAH refund via Remit
ido_mechanics.participation_flow: XAH Payment to issuer during active window → Hook emits Remit with multiplied IOU; rejects invalid/out-of-window attempts

tokenomics.initial_distribution: Primarily via phased IDO; remainder configurable (e.g. vested team, liquidity pools, ecosystem incentives, reserves)

regulatory_classifications.us_sec: Self-assessed as utility token: Value from decentralized participation/utility, not centralized profit expectation (Howey Test review recommended).
regulatory_classifications.eu_mica: Crypto-asset (utility type); disclosures provided via IPFS-linked documentation; follow CASP rules if public offer exceeds thresholds.
regulatory_classifications.uk_fca: Cryptoasset; prominent risk warnings; no unauthorized high-risk promotions to retail users.
regulatory_classifications.global: On-chain transparency supports FATF Travel Rule principles; users advised to apply local AML/KYC standards.

general: High risk of total loss due to volatility, illiquidity, or project failure.
No guaranteed value, returns, secondary market, or adoption.
Hook/smart-logic risks: potential bugs despite best practices.
ido_specific: Soft cap not met → unwind/refund mode may involve delays.
Early-phase higher multipliers reflect higher risk/reward timing.
Possible regulatory reclassification in certain jurisdictions.
risk_disclosures.disclaimer: This is not investment, financial, or legal advice. All participants bear full responsibility. Consult qualified professionals and review local laws.

kyc_aml_policy.approach: Self-certification by participants; issuers may implement additional checks per jurisdiction.
kyc_aml_policy.privacy: On-chain data is public and immutable by design; minimize off-chain personal data collection.
kyc_aml_policy.standards: No facilitation of sanctioned entities; issuers should monitor for compliance.

terms_of_service.acceptance: Sending XAH to the issuer account and/or providing WP_LNK during setup constitutes acknowledgment of all linked terms, risks, and disclosures.
terms_of_service.eligibility: Must be 18+ and not in restricted/sanctioned jurisdictions. Participants self-certify compliance.
terms_of_service.limitations: Issuer may pause, modify, or terminate fundraising for security, compliance, or technical reasons.
terms_of_service.liability: Services and Hook logic provided 'AS IS'; no liability accepted for market losses, technical issues, or third-party actions.
terms_of_service.governing_law: International blockchain norms; disputes recommended via arbitration in a neutral jurisdiction.
terms_of_service.amendments: Terms subject to update; continued participation implies acceptance.

hook_audit.recommended_auditors: Independent firms such as PeckShield, Certik, SlowMist, or equivalent

additional_audits.status: Pending / Planned / Completed (if separate token or tooling audited)

security_features: Guard macros to prevent common errors (overflows, reentrancy, etc.)
audit_and_security.recommendation: All deployers/issuers MUST obtain independent security audits before accepting real-value transactions. Audits materially reduce risk and build user confidence.

tax_reporting.user_responsibility: Participants solely responsible for their own tax and reporting obligations.
tax_reporting.platform_support: On-chain transaction history available via explorers for user reference.

sustainability.note: Xahau uses efficient consensus; issuers may allocate portions of raised funds to environmental or social impact initiatives.
